message:
fix(node): dead code cleanup, bounded push guards, and hardening across 25 modules

Broad sweep of small fixes spanning connector, control_plane, federation,
migration, policy, remote, replay, runtime, security, supply_chain, and
tools subsystems:

Dead code removal:
- fleet_quarantine.rs: remove unused import
- ecosystem_registry.rs, marker_stream.rs, impossible_default.rs,
  reputation.rs: remove unused variables/bindings

Bounded push / overflow guards:
- incident_bundle_retention.rs: add capacity check before push, use
  saturating arithmetic for retention window calculation
- offline_coverage.rs: guard vector growth with configurable bound
- prestage_engine.rs: add bounded entry limit check
- transition_abort.rs: add abort-reason length validation
- bpet_migration_gate.rs: capacity-bound migration checkpoint list
- cancellable_task.rs: guard pending-cancel queue growth
- time_travel_engine.rs: bound snapshot history with eviction

Correctness and hardening:
- perf_budget_guard.rs: simplify threshold comparison logic
- rollout_state.rs: normalize state transition ordering
- atc_participation_weighting.rs: use saturating arithmetic for weight
  accumulation to prevent overflow
- approval_workflow.rs: simplify approval chain validation
- remote/mod.rs: add capability advertisement filtering
- isolation_mesh.rs: strengthen mesh partition boundary checks
- proof_executor.rs: add proof-chain depth limit and validation
- staking_governance.rs: add stake-weight overflow protection
- vef_degraded_mode.rs: expand degradation threshold granularity
- quarantine.rs: simplify quarantine entry lifecycle

Tooling adjustments:
- benchmark_methodology.rs, counterfactual_replay.rs,
  redteam_evaluations.rs: minor formatting/import adjustments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
